recommendations.title: Blacksmithing Scene
recommendations.overview: Three men hammer on an anvil and pass a bottle of beer around. Notable for being the first film in which a scene is being acted out.

recommendations.title: Dickson Experimental Sound Film
recommendations.overview: William K.L. Dickson plays the violin while two men dance. This is the oldest surviving sound film where sound is recorded on the phonograph.

recommendations.title: Monkeyshines, No. 1
recommendations.overview: Experimental film made to test the original cylinder format of the Kinetoscope and believed to be the first film shot in the United States. It shows a blurry figure in white standing in one place making large gestures and is only a few seconds long.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo
recommendations.overview: After the death of her daughter at the hand of her boyfriend, Marisela Escobedo began to fight for justice not only against the murderer but also against the corrupt Mexican judicial system.

recommendations.title: ariana grande: excuse me, i love you
recommendations.overview: Ariana Grande takes the stage in London for her Sweetener World Tour and shares a behind-the-scenes look at her life in rehearsal and on the road.

recommendations.title: The Kiss
recommendations.overview: They get ready to kiss, begin to kiss, and kiss in a way that brings down the house every time.

recommendations.title: Winter on Fire: Ukraine's Fight for Freedom
recommendations.overview: Over 93 days in Ukraine, what started as peaceful student demonstrations became a violent revolution and full-fledged civil rights movement.

recommendations.title: The Execution of Mary, Queen of Scots
recommendations.overview: A short film depicting the execution of Mary, Queen of the Scots. Mary is brought to the execution block and made to kneel down with her neck over it. The executioner lifts his axe ready to bring it down. After that frame Mary has been replaced by a
